_comment: Hero quote pool. One quote is selected randomly on each homepage load.

quotes.text: The best views come after the hardest climbs.
quotes.author: Jesse

quotes.text: A long road feels lighter when the next turn still feels possible.
quotes.author: Pedal & Peak

quotes.text: Every climb starts with one stubborn pedal stroke.
quotes.author: Pedal & Peak

quotes.text: Trails do not ask for speed. They ask you to keep showing up.
quotes.author: Pedal & Peak

quotes.text: Some days the summit is the view. Some days it is just not quitting.
quotes.author: Pedal & Peak
